name: decision-to-teaching
description: Extract pattern rules from .memory/decisions.md and create teaching rules

steps.llm_prompt:
You are analyzing project decisions to extract reusable patterns.

From the following decisions.md content, extract pattern rules in JSON format.
Each rule should be an object with 'rule' (the trigger condition) and 'suggest' (the recommended action).

Format:
[{"rule": "when X", "suggest": "do Y"}]

Only extract actionable patterns that apply broadly, not project-specific details.

Decisions:
{decisions}
